short_description: Number of foreground app events in a defined window
why_it_matters: Basic phone and app engagement signal already useful for baseline and change profiles
privacy_note: Uses package and app metadata only with no message or content text

short_description: Number of days in the window with foreground app records
why_it_matters: Separates actual missingness from days with observed app use
privacy_note: Data availability support and not zero-filled

short_description: Number of distinct foreground apps observed in a window
why_it_matters: Captures breadth of phone use rather than just event volume
privacy_note: Package and app names may be sensitive and should be summarized not exposed in final phenotype outputs

short_description: Entropy or diversity of foreground app use across observed apps
why_it_matters: Captures whether app use is concentrated in one app or spread across multiple apps
privacy_note: Use aggregate diversity only and avoid exposing raw app lists in clinical summaries

short_description: Foreground events excluding system apps where reliable
why_it_matters: Focuses on user-facing app activity rather than Android or system UI transitions
privacy_note: Requires careful validation because system-app labels can be device dependent

short_description: System foreground events such as launcher system UI or keyboard-related app transitions
why_it_matters: May help interpret navigation lock or unlock and device interaction context
privacy_note: Supportive or contextual only and not a direct clinical phenotype by itself

short_description: Share of foreground events belonging to the most frequent app in the window
why_it_matters: Indicates whether phone use is concentrated around a dominant app
privacy_note: Do not report the raw top app name without privacy review

short_description: Foreground events for the CAVIA or AWARE app itself
why_it_matters: Helps understand data collection and app-running context
privacy_note: Data-quality support only and not a patient behavior phenotype

short_description: Number of raw battery rows in a defined window
why_it_matters: Measures battery table logging coverage and device-state observation frequency
privacy_note: Low privacy risk; data-quality/context support only; missing is not zero

short_description: Mean observed battery level in a defined window
why_it_matters: Potential context for device availability charging behavior or phone use intensity
privacy_note: Low privacy risk but weak behavioral specificity; requires observed battery rows

short_description: Minimum observed battery level in a defined window
why_it_matters: May indicate whether device reached low battery during observed window
privacy_note: Low privacy risk but may reflect charging access or logging schedule rather than behavior

short_description: Count of battery rows at or below 20 percent battery level
why_it_matters: Potential device availability context and charging routine marker
privacy_note: Selected manually; threshold fixed at <=20 percent; row-frequency bias possible; missing is not zero

short_description: Count of rows indicating charging or plugged state after validating status/adaptor codes
why_it_matters: Potential charging context and routine marker
privacy_note: Selected manually; charging rule is battery_adaptor != 0 or battery_status in Android charging/full codes after validation

short_description: Number of local dates with at least one battery row
why_it_matters: Data coverage support for battery table
privacy_note: Data-quality support only; missing days are not no battery activity

short_description: Number of distinct Bluetooth addresses observed after deduplication
why_it_matters: Captures breadth of nearby Bluetooth device observations
privacy_note: Uses bt_address internally for counting and reports only aggregate counts

short_description: Ratio of unique Bluetooth addresses to all deduplicated Bluetooth address observations
why_it_matters: Captures how diverse the observed Bluetooth address stream is
privacy_note: Calculated after deduplication as unique bt_address count divided by total deduplicated address observations; missing Bluetooth rows are not zero

short_description: Number of call-log rows in the selected 24-hour window
why_it_matters: Captures observed call-log activity volume
privacy_note: Privacy-sensitive call-log table; aggregate count only; missing is not zero

short_description: Count rows with call_type code 1 incoming
why_it_matters: Captures incoming call exposure/activity context
privacy_note: Incoming calls may be social service spam or other contacts; aggregate only

short_description: Count rows with call_type code 2 outgoing
why_it_matters: Captures outgoing call attempt/activity context
privacy_note: Outgoing calls are communication attempts not necessarily completed conversations

short_description: Count rows with call_type codes 3 missed 5 rejected or 6 blocked
why_it_matters: Captures unanswered or interrupted call context
privacy_note: Grouped major feature; missed rejected and blocked have different meanings and need cautious interpretation

short_description: Sum of numeric call_duration values in seconds
why_it_matters: Captures total observed call duration in the window
privacy_note: Sensitive to outliers; duration does not prove meaningful conversation

short_description: Number of distinct trace values in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures breadth of observed call traces
privacy_note: Trace is an internal identifier and not a person label; aggregate only

short_description: Number of GSM rows in the selected 24-hour window
why_it_matters: Captures GSM logging and cellular-context coverage
privacy_note: Cellular context support only; missing is not zero mobility

short_description: Number of distinct cid values in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures breadth of observed cellular identifiers
privacy_note: Raw cell IDs can imply location context and should remain aggregate only

short_description: Number of distinct lac values in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures breadth of observed cellular location-area identifiers
privacy_note: Coarse context feature; low values do not mean no movement

short_description: Count changes in consecutive cid values ordered by timestamp
why_it_matters: Captures cellular context transitions over time
privacy_note: Sensitive to tower handoff repeated rows and reception conditions

short_description: Count rows with signal_strength present and not sentinel 2147483647
why_it_matters: Captures amount of usable signal-strength evidence
privacy_note: Data-quality support; current sample suggests signal values may be invalid

short_description: Mean signal_strength after excluding sentinel 2147483647
why_it_matters: Captures average signal strength when valid
privacy_note: Use only if enough non-sentinel values exist; not a direct behavioral feature

short_description: Count observed keyboard rows in the selected 24-hour window with duplicate handling documented
why_it_matters: Captures active typing/text-entry event volume
privacy_note: Raw row count may include duplicated rows; missing is not zero typing

short_description: Count distinct keyboard observations after deduplicating repeated text-state rows
why_it_matters: Captures cleaner keyboard observation volume than raw rows
privacy_note: Still not exact keystrokes and depends on logging behavior

short_description: Count distinct package_name values observed in keyboard rows
why_it_matters: Captures breadth of apps where keyboard activity occurred
privacy_note: Package names may be sensitive; final outputs should stay aggregate

short_description: Count rows where is_password indicates password-field typing
why_it_matters: Captures password-field keyboard logging context
privacy_note: Privacy/data-context feature only; not a behavioral phenotype

short_description: Median milliseconds between consecutive deduplicated keyboard observations
why_it_matters: Captures typical keyboard text-state rhythm
privacy_note: Not true key hold or flight time; duplicates and long idle gaps must be handled

short_description: IQR of milliseconds between consecutive deduplicated keyboard observations
why_it_matters: Captures variability of typing rhythm
privacy_note: High variability can reflect pauses interruptions app behavior or logging artifacts

short_description: Count gaps greater than 2 seconds between consecutive keyboard observations inside active typing
why_it_matters: Captures pauses during typing
privacy_note: Pauses can reflect thinking interruption reading or app behavior; not diagnostic

short_description: Count typing bursts separated by gaps greater than 30 seconds
why_it_matters: Captures number of distinct typing episodes
privacy_note: Threshold must be documented and sensitivity-tested

short_description: Median duration from first to last event in each typing burst
why_it_matters: Captures typical active typing episode duration
privacy_note: Depends on logging density and burst threshold

short_description: Infer word boundaries from space transitions and compute median word completion time
why_it_matters: Captures approximate word production timing
privacy_note: Uses raw text transiently only; language emoji and editing complicate parsing

short_description: Median time from word boundary to next non-space text-state change
why_it_matters: Captures approximate pause between words
privacy_note: Space is an imperfect proxy and may vary by language and app

short_description: Count transitions where text length decreases
why_it_matters: Captures deletion or backspace-like behavior
privacy_note: Deletion can reflect editing typo correction field reset or app behavior

short_description: Deletion/edit events divided by distinct keyboard observations
why_it_matters: Captures relative correction burden
privacy_note: Requires exact transition rules and is not direct error rate

short_description: Count transitions where text length increases
why_it_matters: Captures text-entry progress observations
privacy_note: Not exact character count because one event can add multiple characters or emoji

short_description: Count transitions where current text newly ends with a space
why_it_matters: Captures approximate word-boundary observations
privacy_note: Space boundary is only a proxy for words and may not generalize across text styles

short_description: Count observed light rows in the selected 24-hour window
why_it_matters: Captures light-table coverage and sampling density
privacy_note: Data-quality support; missing is not darkness

short_description: Mean numeric double_light_lux in the selected 24-hour window
why_it_matters: Captures average ambient light exposure/context
privacy_note: Phone placement can dominate lux values; not direct room illumination

short_description: Median numeric double_light_lux in the selected 24-hour window
why_it_matters: Captures typical ambient light level with less outlier sensitivity
privacy_note: Phone may be pocketed covered or face-down; missing is not zero lux

short_description: Percent valid lux samples below a low-light threshold such as 10 lux
why_it_matters: Captures approximate low-light or dark context
privacy_note: Low lux can reflect pocket bag or covered phone; not sleep by itself

short_description: Mean lux during local nighttime hours such as 22:00-06:00
why_it_matters: Captures nighttime light exposure/context
privacy_note: Requires sufficient nighttime samples and careful timezone handling

short_description: Mean lux during local daytime hours such as 06:00-22:00
why_it_matters: Captures daytime light exposure/context
privacy_note: Depends on sensor exposure and phone placement

short_description: IQR of valid double_light_lux values in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures variability in observed ambient light context
privacy_note: Variability may reflect phone placement or logging artifacts

short_description: Count rows in a bounded protocol window
why_it_matters: Captures data coverage and sensor activity
privacy_note: No rows found in current T1-week protocol scan; missing is not no movement

short_description: Mean vector magnitude from x y z acceleration values
why_it_matters: Captures average phone acceleration intensity if keys are confirmed
privacy_note: Requires protocol-valid data and confirmed JSON keys; phone movement is not body movement

short_description: Fraction of samples above a defined magnitude threshold
why_it_matters: Captures proportion of high phone-movement samples if data exist
privacy_note: Threshold must be validated; no current protocol data

short_description: IQR of acceleration vector magnitude
why_it_matters: Captures variability of phone acceleration if data exist
privacy_note: Sensitive to phone placement and sampling; no current protocol data

short_description: Frequency-domain energy from resampled acceleration magnitude
why_it_matters: Could capture rhythmic phone-motion signal if continuous data are available
privacy_note: Requires confirmed sampling frequency resampling and protocol-valid data

short_description: Dominant FFT frequency from bounded acceleration-magnitude segments
why_it_matters: Could summarize repeated movement frequency in phone motion
privacy_note: Requires regular sampling artifact handling and protocol-valid data

short_description: Mean absolute change in acceleration magnitude over time
why_it_matters: Could capture abruptness or smoothness of phone movement
privacy_note: Highly sensitive to sampling rate phone placement and missingness

short_description: Count distinct timestamp/location observations in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures location data availability and sampling density
privacy_note: Aggregate count only; missing is not no movement

short_description: Sum haversine distance between consecutive distinct valid coordinates
why_it_matters: Approximate phone movement distance in the selected window
privacy_note: Raw coordinates should not be model-facing; GPS jitter and phone carrying behavior can inflate distance

short_description: Root mean square distance from the center of observed coordinates
why_it_matters: Captures spatial spread of phone movement
privacy_note: Aggregate only; sensitive to outliers and location accuracy

short_description: Maximum distance from the first valid coordinate in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures how far the phone moved from the starting observed location
privacy_note: Starting point may not be home and should not be interpreted as home

short_description: Fraction of observations near the most common location cluster
why_it_matters: Captures concentration near one main place without storing raw coordinates
privacy_note: Requires a documented clustering or distance-threshold rule

short_description: Distinct observations from GPS provider divided by all distinct observations
why_it_matters: Supports interpretation of location accuracy and provider mix
privacy_note: Data-quality/context feature not behavior by itself

short_description: Median reported location accuracy in meters
why_it_matters: Supports reliability assessment for location-derived features
privacy_note: Quality support only; not a behavioral phenotype by itself

short_description: Count distinct message observations after deduplication
why_it_matters: Captures SMS/message-log activity volume
privacy_note: Aggregate only; no raw message text phone numbers contacts or addresses

short_description: Count distinct observations where message_type is received/inbox
why_it_matters: Captures received-message volume if Android/AWARE type mapping is correct
privacy_note: Aggregate only; missing is not zero communication

short_description: Count distinct observations where message_type is sent
why_it_matters: Captures sent-message volume if Android/AWARE type mapping is correct
privacy_note: Aggregate only; does not measure content or social quality

short_description: Count distinct observations with outbox failed or queued message types
why_it_matters: Captures possible delivery or technical context
privacy_note: Sparse and platform-dependent; interpret cautiously

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one distinct message observation
why_it_matters: Captures temporal spread of message activity
privacy_note: Sparse windows can make this unstable

short_description: Number of activity-recognition events in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures activity-recognition data volume and availability
privacy_note: Aggregate categorical sensor context only; not direct clinical activity

short_description: Number of events with confidence above a documented threshold
why_it_matters: Separates stronger inferred activity context from low-confidence labels
privacy_note: Threshold must be documented and sensitivity checked

short_description: Mean confidence across activity-recognition events
why_it_matters: Supports interpretation of reliability for activity-state features
privacy_note: Quality/context feature and not a behavioral phenotype by itself

short_description: Fraction of top activity labels classified as still
why_it_matters: Captures relative still-labeled phone context within observed activity-recognition events
privacy_note: Still is not sleep inactivity or home presence; phone carriage matters

short_description: Number of events classified as walking or on_foot
why_it_matters: Captures walking-like or on-foot phone context
privacy_note: Phone-derived label only and can be affected by carrying behavior

short_description: Number of events classified as in_vehicle
why_it_matters: Captures vehicle-like phone context
privacy_note: Not a direct travel measure and may be sparse or confidence-dependent

short_description: Fraction of top activity labels classified as unknown
why_it_matters: Captures uncertainty or unclassified activity context
privacy_note: Should be interpreted as sensor/algorithm uncertainty not behavior

short_description: Diversity of top activity states in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures breadth of observed activity-recognition states
privacy_note: Aggregate only; depends on recognition model and sampling

short_description: Count of changes between consecutive top activity states
why_it_matters: Captures variability in phone-derived activity context
privacy_note: Transitions can reflect sampling artifacts and label noise

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one activity-recognition event
why_it_matters: Captures temporal spread and coverage of the activity-recognition stream
privacy_note: Data coverage support; missing is not no activity

short_description: Count all screen rows in the selected window
why_it_matters: Basic screen-state event volume useful as a phone engagement signal
privacy_note: Event count is not screen time and repeated transitions can inflate count

short_description: Count rows where screen_status equals 3
why_it_matters: Approximate count of unlock events and active phone access opportunities
privacy_note: Unlocks are not direct task engagement and depend on status-code mapping

short_description: Count rows where screen_status equals 1
why_it_matters: Approximate screen-on activations
privacy_note: Screen-on events can occur without meaningful interaction

short_description: Count rows where screen_status equals 0
why_it_matters: Approximate screen-off transitions
privacy_note: Mostly useful together with on and unlock transitions

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one screen event
why_it_matters: Captures temporal spread of screen-state activity
privacy_note: Sparse logging can make this unstable; missing is not no use

short_description: Count screen events during local nighttime hours 22:00-06:00
why_it_matters: Captures nighttime phone screen-state activity context
privacy_note: Night screen activity is not sleep disturbance by itself

short_description: Count changes between consecutive screen_status values ordered by timestamp
why_it_matters: Captures screen-state switching intensity
privacy_note: Can reflect OS logging behavior as well as use behavior

short_description: Sum time from unlocked events to next lock or off event when observable
why_it_matters: Approximate unlocked-session duration
privacy_note: Requires careful pairing and censoring at window boundaries

short_description: Median paired unlocked-session duration
why_it_matters: Typical unlocked-session length
privacy_note: Sensitive to missing lock or off events and repeated status rows

short_description: Whether at least one accelerometer metadata row exists in the selected window
why_it_matters: Confirms accelerometer metadata was logged for the device/window
privacy_note: Hardware metadata only; not movement data

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_minimum_delay
why_it_matters: Hardware sampling capability/context
privacy_note: Does not prove actual accelerometer sampling occurred

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_resolution
why_it_matters: Hardware resolution/context
privacy_note: Hardware context only; not behavior

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_maximum_range
why_it_matters: Hardware range/context
privacy_note: Hardware context only; not movement

short_description: Whether at least one proximity metadata row exists in the selected window
why_it_matters: Confirms proximity metadata was logged for the device/window
privacy_note: Hardware metadata only; not proximity behavior

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_resolution
why_it_matters: Hardware resolution/context
privacy_note: Hardware context only; not behavior

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_maximum_range
why_it_matters: Hardware range/context
privacy_note: Hardware context only; not near/far events

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_minimum_delay
why_it_matters: Hardware sampling capability/context
privacy_note: Does not prove actual proximity sampling occurred

short_description: Count all telephony rows in the selected window
why_it_matters: Telephony-state logging volume and connectivity context
privacy_note: Data volume/context feature; not phone use by itself

short_description: Fraction of rows with data_enabled indicating enabled/on state
why_it_matters: Mobile-data availability and connectivity context
privacy_note: Coding of data_enabled must be confirmed; not actual internet use

short_description: Diversity across observed network_type values
why_it_matters: Variation in cellular network mode such as LTE or other
privacy_note: Depends on Android code mapping and device reporting

short_description: Count changes between consecutive network_type values ordered by timestamp
why_it_matters: Cellular network-mode switching context
privacy_note: May reflect coverage modem behavior or logging frequency

short_description: Fraction of rows where sim_state indicates ready
why_it_matters: SIM availability and connectivity support
privacy_note: Mostly data-quality/connectivity support; not behavior

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one telephony row
why_it_matters: Temporal spread of telephony-state logging
privacy_note: Data coverage support; missing is not no connectivity

short_description: Whether at least one light-sensor metadata row exists in the selected window
why_it_matters: Confirms ambient-light sensor metadata was logged for the device/window
privacy_note: Hardware metadata only; use raw light table for lux exposure features

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_resolution
why_it_matters: Hardware resolution/context for the light sensor

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_maximum_range
why_it_matters: Hardware range/context for the light sensor

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_minimum_delay
why_it_matters: Hardware sampling capability/context for the light sensor

short_description: Whether at least one rotation-vector metadata row exists in the selected window

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_resolution

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_maximum_range

privacy_note: Hardware capability only; not a patient phenotype

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_minimum_delay

short_description: Whether at least one gravity-sensor metadata row exists in the selected window

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_resolution

privacy_note: Does not measure phone posture orientation or movement

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_maximum_range
why_it_matters: Hardware range/context for the gravity sensor

short_description: Whether at least one gyroscope metadata row exists in the selected window

short_description: Count distinct neighboring-cell observations after deduplicating repeated timestamp/cell rows
why_it_matters: Captures usable neighboring-cell observation volume
privacy_note: Aggregate cellular context only; missing is not no mobility

short_description: Number of distinct valid neighbor cid values in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures breadth of neighboring cellular identifiers
privacy_note: Raw cell IDs can imply location context and should remain aggregate only

short_description: Number of distinct valid neighbor lac values in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures breadth of neighboring location-area identifiers
privacy_note: Coarse cellular context; missing is not no movement

short_description: Count changes between consecutive valid neighbor cid values ordered by timestamp
why_it_matters: Captures neighboring cellular-context transitions
privacy_note: Sensitive to repeated logging tower handoff and reception conditions

short_description: Fraction of distinct neighbor observations with signal_strength present and not sentinel or invalid values
why_it_matters: Supports interpretation of usable signal-strength evidence
privacy_note: Data-quality/context support; signal coding must be validated

short_description: Mean signal_strength among distinct valid neighbor observations after excluding sentinel or invalid values
why_it_matters: Captures average neighboring-cell signal context when valid

short_description: Count distinct touch observations after deduplicating repeated timestamp app action and scroll rows
why_it_matters: Captures touchscreen interaction volume beyond screen state
privacy_note: Event count is not exact taps because logging duplicates and OS events may occur

short_description: Count distinct observations where touch_action is ACTION_AWARE_TOUCH_CLICKED
why_it_matters: Captures click or tap-like interaction events
privacy_note: Click labels are app accessibility events not exact finger taps

short_description: Count distinct observations where touch_action contains SCROLLED
why_it_matters: Captures scroll-like interaction events

short_description: Count changes between consecutive scroll directions up and down after deduplication
why_it_matters: Captures interaction variability during scrolling
privacy_note: Sensitive to duplicate handling and app layout

short_description: Count distinct touch_app values in the selected window
why_it_matters: Captures breadth of apps with touch interaction
privacy_note: Package names should remain aggregate and not be exposed as raw model features

short_description: Diversity of touch events across touch_app values
why_it_matters: Captures concentration versus breadth of touch interaction by app
privacy_note: Depends on package naming and system UI logging

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one distinct touch observation
why_it_matters: Captures temporal spread of touch interaction

short_description: Median absolute difference between scroll_to_index and scroll_from_index for valid scroll rows

short_description: Count significant rows in the adjusted first-available 7-day window

short_description: Count rows where is_moving indicates moving in the adjusted first-available 7-day window
why_it_matters: Captures moving-labeled significant events

short_description: Fraction of valid significant rows where is_moving indicates moving

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one significant row

short_description: Count changes in consecutive valid is_moving states ordered by timestamp

short_description: Count sensor_linear_accelerometer rows in the adjusted first-available 7-day window
why_it_matters: Captures metadata logging volume once this delayed stream becomes available

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one sensor_linear_accelerometer metadata row
why_it_matters: Captures temporal spread of metadata observations
privacy_note: Data availability support only; missing is not no movement

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_minimum_delay in adjusted first-available window
why_it_matters: Hardware sampling capability/context

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_resolution in adjusted first-available window
why_it_matters: Hardware resolution/context

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_maximum_range in adjusted first-available window
why_it_matters: Hardware range/context

short_description: Median or first observed double_sensor_power_ma in adjusted first-available window

short_description: Max pressure minus min pressure from cleaned barometer pressure in the adjusted first-available 7-day window

short_description: Standard deviation of cleaned barometer pressure in the adjusted first-available 7-day window

short_description: Sum absolute estimated elevation change across detected large vertical transitions using 8.3 meters per hPa

short_description: Count detected transitions where pressure decreases enough to imply upward elevation change
why_it_matters: Captures likely upward vertical movement context

short_description: Count detected transitions where pressure increases enough to imply downward elevation change
why_it_matters: Captures likely downward vertical movement context

short_description: Count minutes in bounded chunks with enough raw accelerometer samples after duplicate and gap checks
why_it_matters: Defines usable signal exposure before motion interpretation

short_description: Median timestamp interval between consecutive raw accelerometer samples in bounded chunks
why_it_matters: Documents observed sampling rate and feasibility for filtering or spectral analysis
privacy_note: Device and OS dependent; not a behavioral feature

short_description: Fraction of expected chunk time affected by gaps above a defined threshold such as 1 second
why_it_matters: Captures continuity limitations for high-frequency signal analysis
privacy_note: Depends on expected sampling rate and chunk definition

short_description: Mean absolute deviation of acceleration magnitude from a local gravity baseline after smoothing
why_it_matters: Captures phone-motion intensity beyond static gravity
privacy_note: Phone motion is not body movement; gravity baseline method must be fixed

short_description: Standard deviation of gravity-corrected dynamic acceleration magnitude in bounded chunks
why_it_matters: Captures variability of phone movement after baseline correction
privacy_note: Sensitive to phone placement sampling and filtering choices

short_description: Count contiguous dynamic-acceleration bursts above a validated threshold after filtering
why_it_matters: Captures discrete bursts of phone movement
privacy_note: Threshold duration and refractory rules must be documented

short_description: Fraction of valid signal time where dynamic acceleration remains below a stillness threshold
why_it_matters: Captures phone-still context when signal is available
privacy_note: Phone may be still while patient is active; not no activity

short_description: Median absolute derivative of filtered dynamic acceleration magnitude
why_it_matters: Captures abruptness or smoothness of phone motion
privacy_note: Highly sensitive to sampling interval and resampling method

short_description: Power in low-frequency motion band after resampling and Butterworth-filtered magnitude signal
why_it_matters: Captures slow rhythmic phone-motion components
privacy_note: Requires validated sampling regularity and chunk length

short_description: Dominant frequency from valid bounded chunks after detrending filtering windowing and FFT
why_it_matters: Summarizes strongest repeated phone-motion frequency
privacy_note: Only valid in continuous chunks; not clinically interpretable alone
